title: Shri Krishna
desc: When evil takes over the world, Lord Vishnu incarnates into the world as Shri Krishna for the protection of the righteous and the destruction of the wicked. S01 E01.

title: Adiparashakthi
desc: Goddess Adhiparasakthi comes to the rescue of her devotees when they are in trouble and makes them realize the importance of worshiping and believing in Her. S01 E18.

title: Marmadesam
desc: Marmadesam is a classic Tamil mystery series focusing on the mysterious healing powers of Navabhashanam Lingams, centered around a village and an ashram that claims to cure all diseases. S01 E39.

title: Ramayan
desc: Rama, the prince of Ayodhya, goes into exile due to his father's promise. Later, Ravana kidnaps Sita and Rama wages a war against him to rescue her and returns to Ayodhya to be crowned king. S01 E02.

title: Vishnu Sahasranamam
desc: The Vishnu Sahasranamam is a Sanskrit hymn containing a list of the 1,000 names of Vishnu, one of the main deities in Hinduism and the Supreme God in Vaishnavism. It is one of the most sacred. S01 E27.

title: Lalitha Sahasranamam
desc: The Lalita Sahasranama is a Hindu religious text that enumerates the thousand names of Mother Goddess Lalita, which are held sacred in Hinduism particularly in Shaktism, the tradition focused. S01 E28.

desc: Kandha Sashti Kavasam is a Tamil devotional song composed in Tamil on the Lord Murugan, the son of Shiva. S01 E11.
